rulings.Case Title: MIRMAZ COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP VS. MICHAEL SCHINNER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Mirmaz Company'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: COURT VACATES 6-7-05 RULING. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER LEASES OBTAINED BY FRAUD. GRANT- MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DEFENSES FAILURE STATE CAUSES OF ACTION, STATUTE OF LIMITATION,FAILURE TO MITIGATE, ESTOPPEL & WAIVER. DENY-MOTION SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO REMAINDER.MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ/PB)
